generated_oml:
instance StyrofoamInsulatedContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance RaspberryPi4ModelBController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance PCBWithMOSFETsAndOptocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current handling"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance AmbientDS18S20 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for ambient temperature measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientDS18S20_TemperatureData
]

instance InternalDS18S20_1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal temperature measurement 1"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalDS18S20_1_TemperatureData
]

instance InternalDS18S20_2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal temperature measurement 2"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalDS18S20_2_TemperatureData
]

instance AmbientDS18S20_TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientDS18S20
]

instance InternalDS18S20_1_TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalDS18S20_1
]

instance InternalDS18S20_2_TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalDS18S20_2
]

instance AmbientTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data from ambient DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientDS18S20_TemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQMessageBroker
]

instance InternalTemperatureData1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data from internal DS18S20 sensor 1"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalDS18S20_1_TemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQMessageBroker
]

instance InternalTemperatureData2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data from internal DS18S20 sensor 2"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalDS18S20_2_TemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQMessageBroker
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed (heating actuator) with dimensions 214×214×3 mm"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan (air circulation actuator) with airflow of 0.02 m³/s"
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with parameters C_air and G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibration
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with parameters C_heater, C_air, G_heater, and G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibration
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, BangBangControlService, DataTransmissionService
]

instance ScipyCalibration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance OneWireProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire protocol for sensor communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance PCBDesignTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design tools for creating PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers"
    DTDFVocab:enables PCBDesignService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub for open-source code repository"
    DTDFVocab:enables GitHubService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating temperature predictions using simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePrediction
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for calibrating thermal models using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationResult
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control strategy service with adjustable upper/lower limits, heating duration, and waiting duration parameters"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustHeatingDuration, AdjustWaitingDuration
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for transmitting sensor data from physical to virtual twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmission
]

instance PCBDesignService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for designing PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers"
    DTDFVocab:provides PCBDesign
]

instance GitHubService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for version control using GitHub"
    DTDFVocab:provides GitHubVersionControl
]

instance TemperaturePrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from thermal models"
]

instance ModelCalibrationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated parameters for thermal models"
]

instance AdjustHeatingDuration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting heating duration H parameter for bang-bang controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustWaitingDuration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusting waiting duration C parameter for bang-bang controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataTransmission : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data transmission from physical sensors to virtual twin"
]

instance PCBDesign : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "PCB design for thermal incubator system"
]

instance GitHubVersionControl : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Version control for digital twin code repository"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Controller sends actuation commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan control) via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes them on hardware components using MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components include RabbitMQ communication server, low-level driver (hardware interface), and controller (control logic), interconnected via RabbitMQ message passing for synchronization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the 'as operated' phase of the physical system, as it integrates models to monitor and simulate the deployed incubator's behavior during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validated through uniform temperature experiments (testing Assumption 1), with sensor discrepancies measured (max 7°C difference without 18V fan, reduced to 6°C with 18V fan); Model B better predicts thermal inertia of the heatbed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between PT and DT components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and DT components (controller, low-level driver) hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is implemented in the low-level driver to maintain device safety, with MOSFETs and optocouplers providing electrical isolation between control signals and high-power components."
]
